title: Telegram Non-Blocking Delivery Fix

daily_lock_logic.rule: work_status and telegram_status are INDEPENDENT. Work is not failed if delivery fails.

failure_handling.telegram_timeout: Log TELEGRAM_DELIVERY_FAILED in daily lock, retry once, save report path
failure_handling.work_already_saved: All reports written in step 11 before delivery attempt
failure_handling.next_run_unaffected: Daily lock with work_status=completed enables next run
